tagline: A OS que resolve. O sistema que escala.
industry: B2B SaaS for cellphone and electronics repair shops (Brazil)
concept: Evolve the current basic wrench icon into a distinctive, professional mark. Fuse the idea of a continuous LOOP (the recurring service cycle, subscription, returning customer) with a subtle repair/tech cue. Avoid clichEs; create a memorable, scalable symbol that reads clearly at 16px and on a billboard.

logo_symbol.idea: A clean geometric loop / infinite-cycle made from a single rounded ribbon, optionally hinting in negative space at a wrench head, a gear tooth, or a stylized 'S'. One continuous stroke, optically balanced, contained in a soft squircle.
logo_symbol.style: flat, geometric, consistent stroke weight, no skeuomorphism, no inner gradients except in the master color version
must: works in a single solid color

deliverables.app_icon: Master app/system icon: rounded square (squircle, ~22% corner radius), brand gradient background, white symbol. 1024x1024.
deliverables.favicon: Simplified symbol only, optimized for 16/32/48px, high contrast, no fine detail.
deliverables.logo_horizontal: Symbol + 'SmartLoop' wordmark to the right, for headers/navbars. Provide light-bg and dark-bg versions.
deliverables.logo_vertical: Symbol centered above the wordmark, for splash screens and print.
deliverables.logo_social: Square avatar (symbol on gradient) for Instagram/WhatsApp, safe-area aware.
deliverables.monochrome_flat: Single-color flat-icon version (pure black and pure white) for stamps, watermarks, invoices, embroidery.

wordmark.case: 'SmartLoop' as one word with capital S and L
wordmark.color_split: 'Smart' in dark neutral, 'Loop' in brand blue; full white when on gradient

usage.clear_space: minimum 50% of symbol height on all sides
dont: no drop shadow on the glyph
max 2 colors in the flat version
